component.name: Eidolon Drift
component.summary: Terminal-based incident response space horror game

description.p: Eidolon Drift is a curses-based adventure game in which you play as an incident responder aboard a distressed spaceship. Your mission: navigate through the vessel, reach the Command Module, and escape using the emergency pod.
As your sanity deteriorates, your field of vision shrinks — creating tense, atmospheric exploration with procedurally generated ship layouts each playthrough.

ul.li: Procedural map generation for unique playthroughs
Sanity system that affects vision range
Atmospheric ambient messages and sector events
Multiple colour themes: dark, retro, high-contrast
In-game command system: scan, inspect, decrypt, use, and more

description.p: Fix ambient message rendering and improve Windows compatibility.
